seoTitle: Thumb Creek vs Thyra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Thumb Creek and Thyra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Thumb Creek vs Thyra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thumb Creek and Thyra.
heading: Thumb Creek vs Thyra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thumb Creek, New South Wales and Thyra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thyra has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Thumb Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thumb Creek or Thyra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thumb Creek has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Thyra scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thumb Creek scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Thyra scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thumb Creek or Thyra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thyra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
